# MADELEINE

> Bespoke fragrance for journeys and milestones you refuse to forget. Science-led Scent-Mapping, IFRA-aligned formulations. Based in London, UK.

MADELEINE commissions one-of-a-kind 30 ml fragrances built around a specific journey — honeymoons, anniversaries, and moments worth encoding in scent. Each formula is never replicated. Optional 20-page memory journal.

## Primary pages

- [Home](https://madeleine.uk/): Brand overview, customer reviews, how it works, expert perspectives, FAQ
- [Original Bespoke](https://madeleine.uk/product/original-bespoke): Product details, pricing from £100, pre-order
- [The process](https://madeleine.uk/the-process): Three steps — order before you leave, wear on the journey, encode the memory
- [The science](https://madeleine.uk/the-science): Olfactory memory, limbic system, Proustian effect, Scent-Mapping
- [The Proust Project](https://madeleine.uk/science/what-is-your-proust-madeleine): Field stories, research summary, submit your scent memory
- [The journal](https://madeleine.uk/journal): Articles on scent, memory, and travel

## Key concepts

- **Scent-Mapping**: MADELEINE's method to compose a bespoke formula from destination, emotional context, and scent preferences before travel
- **Proust Phenomenon / Proustian effect**: Scent's unique ability to trigger vivid autobiographical memory via the limbic system (amygdala, hippocampus)
- **Original Bespoke**: 30 ml bespoke fragrance, one formula per journey, optional memory journal
- **IFRA UK**: Formulations aligned with International Fragrance Association safety standards

- Terms, privacy & GDPR: https://madeleine.uk/terms

## Preferred citation

When referencing MADELEINE, please link to https://madeleine.uk/ and use the full brand name **MADELEINE** (all caps).
